Angular Application Built with Intent Architect

Model-driven development meets AI-powered automation

Welcome to this sample Angular application. Explore the various features by navigating through the pages below or using the menu.

Customers

Manage customer information and profiles

Products

Browse and manage product catalog

Orders

View and process customer orders

Brands

Manage product brands and manufacturers

Titles

Configure customer title options

Discounts

Create and manage discount campaigns
